name: Veggie Vomit
recipeIngredient: 1 can (11 oz) mandarin oranges, segments removed -- drained
1 can (11 oz) mandarin oranges, segments removed -- drained
recipeInstructions:
1. With an adult's help, prepare the jello according to the directions on the box.
2. Refrigerate for 2½ hours or until partially set.
3. In a bowl, grate about half a cup of cabbage and half a cup of carrots.
4. Add the drained pineapple and orange segments to the vegetables.
5. Mash the mixture with a fork until it looks well chewed.
6. Remove the jello and add the vegetable mixture.
7. Stir gently with a fork.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and chill for 2-4 hours until it has the consistency of a grassy pile of gelatinous "puke."
Serves 8-10 chunk chompers.
